text: I enjoy breaking down complex problems into smaller parts and solving them step by step.
I prefer coming up with new ideas and unconventional solutions over following established methods.
I find hands-on projects more satisfying than studying theoretical concepts.
I work better in a team than when working alone.
I enjoy taking on challenges that are uncertain or have no clear solution.
I like to understand how systems work at a deep technical level.
I enjoy designing things — whether it is software interfaces, systems, or physical objects.
I prefer structured tasks with clear rules and defined outcomes.
